CHANGE RECORD 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID  is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

ACRONYM TABLE 
 
Acronym Description 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
NRT Near Real Time 
REP Reprocessing 
MY Multi-year 
SST Sea Surface Temperature 
Argo International profiling float network (www.argo.net) 
BGC-ARGO Biogeochemical Argo 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
EOF Extended Orthogonal Function 
MLD Mixed Layer Depth 
CIL Cold Intermediate Layer 
CCC Cold Content in the CIL 
DCM Deep Chlorophyll maximum 
DOX Dissolved oxygen 
CHL Chlorophyll 
NWS North-Western Shelf (of the Black Sea) 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
 
MLD Various criteria exist to define the MLD. In the Black Sea, the MLD is usually 
defined as the depth at which density is 0.125 kg.m -3 larger than at the 
reference depth (usually 3m, but 10m in the current validation exercice) 
CIL In the Black Sea, a layer of water that is colder than the water above and 
below. It is considered to have less than 8.35°C. 
 
RELEVANT DOCUMENT LIST

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for BLKSEA_ANALYSISFORECAST_BGC_007_010, detailing the production and validation of biogeochemical analysis and forecast products in the Black Sea.
